widgets.title: Average Salary by Department
widgets.sqlQuery: SELECT DEPARTMENT, AVG(SALARY) FROM EMPLOYEES GROUP BY DEPARTMENT ORDER BY AVG(SALARY) DESC

widgets.title: Monthly Revenue Trends
widgets.sqlQuery: SELECT "MONTH", SUM(REVENUE) FROM SALES GROUP BY "MONTH" ORDER BY SUM(REVENUE)

widgets.title: Product Inventory
widgets.sqlQuery: SELECT PRODUCT_NAME AS "Product Name", CATEGORY AS "Category", UNITS_SOLD AS "Units Sold", PRICE AS "Price ($)" FROM PRODUCTS ORDER BY UNITS_SOLD DESC
